3118650.name: Pix Souls
3118650.description:
A darkness has swallowed the lands and cursed most of its creatures to an endless cycle of death. Due to the Dark Necromancers curse, most creatures cannot die and instead lose part of their souls on death. As creatures die their souls shatter leaving behind fragments known as Pix. The more a creature dies the less they remember who they were and more evil and primitive they become. The Dark Necromancer has found a way to harvest these Pix to grow in power and is now on a rampage across the lands killing and turning all creatures into husks of their former selves. The world is slowly being consumed by the darkness left behind by the Necromancer and it is in a village that has been yet untouched that our journey begins...

You are a young knight that has set out for your morning duties unbeknownst to you the dangers that you will soon face.

Pix Souls is a 2.5D Turn Based RPG Adventure. Set across the lands to rid the world of darkness and purge the lands of evil creatures. Find a way to defeat the Necromancer and save the world from total darkness!

Turn Based Combat: Use different weapons, items, and allies to defeat the darkness and save the world!

Exploration: Find secret items, weapons, allies, bosses and more!

Bosses and enemies: over 100 different bosses and enemies to fight!

Runes: Find runes to customize your fighting style and alter your character/allies

Pix: Gather Pix to level up and increase your stats. Pix are also used as currency to purchase items and upgrades.

Allies: Find Allies that will aid you on your quest

Upgrade: Upgrade your hero, allies, and weapons to better deal with the dangers ahead!
3118650.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
